context:
AKIRA INTEL
===========
💡Found 25 new samples of Akira Ransomware, which was created on 21st August, 2024
💡All these samples began to appear in late September
💡All these files are sized at 1.02 MB
💡Mutexes: _SHuassist.mtx, C20CD437-BA6D-4ebb-B190-70B43DE3B0F3
💡These mutexes previously assocaited with: ShadowRoot Ransomware, Stealer Trojans etc.

TOR
